Bug / Task Description: ORMap.Merge in pkg/crdt/ormap.go merges key membership and per-key last-writer-wins values. Currently, when a key exists in BOTH maps the local register is left untouched, so a newer remote value is never adopted and the merge keeps a stale local value with an older timestamp. Disjoint keys merge fine, masking the defect; convergence breaks only for keys updated concurrently on both replicas.
Commit Subject: fix(crdt): always LWW-merge ORMap values on shared keys
